greeting.speaker: npc
greeting.text: Easy there, traveler. The grass is friendly, but the forest is not.

choices.text: I need to cross the forest.

who_are_you.speaker: player
who_are_you.text: Who are you, and why are you waiting out here?

mouse_intro.speaker: npc
mouse_intro.text: A mouse with an old sword and older mistakes. I keep watch so smaller paws can pass alive.

need_crossing.speaker: player
need_crossing.text: I am looking for my family. If the trail goes through the forest, I have to follow it.

forest_warning.speaker: npc
forest_warning.text: Then listen closely. Do not fight every shadow. Hide when the grass allows it, and spend your strength only when it matters.

gift_offer.speaker: npc
gift_offer.text: Take this little pack and this map. The pack will carry what your paws cannot, and the map will remember places you forget.

gift_result.speaker: player
gift_result.text: Thank you. I will come back if I find anything about the forest.
